title: Grilled Deodeok Skewers with Brazilian Sauce
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make Korean-inspired dish featuring deodeok, a type of mountain ginger, marinated in a zesty Brazilian-style sauce. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: 1. Cut the deodeok into 1-inch pieces and place in a large bowl.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together Brazilian sauce, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
3. Pour the marinade over the deodeok and toss to coat.
4. Thread the marinated deodeok onto the robust skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
7. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the deodeok is tender and slightly charred.
8. Serve immediately with a side of root and Brazilian sauce for dipping.
